items.title: First ever talks to ditch fossil fuels as UN deadlock deepens
items.summary: Some 60 countries are meeting in Colombia as frustration grows with lack of progress in tackling climate change

items.title: Scientists make stunning discovery that could change our understanding of the Universe
items.summary: Scientists may have uncovered a surprising secret behind why life exists at all. items.title: Scientists discover a new way to prevent gum disease without killing good bacteria
items.summary: Scientists have uncovered a surprising way to influence the bacteria living in our mouths — not by killing them, but by interrupting how they “talk” to each other. items.title: What scientists found inside coral reefs could change the future of medicine
items.summary: Beneath the beauty of coral reefs lies a hidden universe of microbes unlike anything scientists expected. items.title: A common constipation drug shows surprising power to protect kidneys
items.summary: A common constipation drug may have unexpectedly unlocked a new way to slow chronic kidney disease — a condition that affects millions and often leads to dialysis.
